case.title: FIDELITY & CASUALTY CO. OF NEW YORK v. SOUTHERN R NEWS CO.

opinion.h1: FIDELITY & CASUALTY CO. OF NEW YORK v. SOUTHERN R NEWS CO., 214 U.S. 498 (1909)
opinion.h2: FIDELITY & CASUALTY COMPANY OF NEW YORK, Plaintiff in Error, v. SOUTHERN RAILWAY NEWS COMPANY. No. 165.
opinion.p: Mr. William H. Field for plaintiff in error.
Mr. Charles F. Taylor for defendant in error.

Writ of Error dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Central Land Co. v. Laidley, 159 U.S. 103, 40 L. Ed. 91, 16 Sup. Ct. Rep. 80; Sayward v. Denny, 158 U.S. 180, 39 L. Ed. 941, 15 Sup. Ct. Rep. 777; Bacon v. Texas, 163 U.S. 207, 41 L. Ed. 132, 16 Sup. Ct. Rep. 1023; Burt v. Smith, 203 U.S. 135, 51 L. Ed. 126, 27 Sup. Ct. Rep. 37; Barrington v. Missouri, 205 U.S. 485, 51 L. Ed. 893, 27 Sup. Ct. Rep. 582; Tracy v. Ginzberg, 205 U.S. 170, 51 L. Ed. 755, 27 Sup. Ct. Rep. 461; Thompson v. Kentucky, 209 U.S. 340, 52 L. Ed. 822, 28 Sup. Ct. Rep. 533.
